sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ طِفْلَةٌ اسْمُهَا رَانِيَةُ مَحْفَظَةً عَلَى الأَرْضِ.
sentences.translation: Djevojčica po imenu Ranija pronašla je novčanik na tlu.
sentences.translationEn: A girl named Rania found a wallet on the ground.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِي الْمَحْفَظَةِ مَالٌ وَبِطَاقَةٌ بِاسْمِ صَاحِبِهَا.
sentences.translation: U novčaniku je bio novac i kartica s imenom vlasnika.
sentences.translationEn: The wallet had money and a card with the owner's name.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ رَانِيَةُ إِلَى الشُّرْطِيِّ وَأَعْطَتْهُ الْمَحْفَظَةَ.
sentences.translation: Ranija je otišla policajcu i dala mu novčanik.
sentences.translationEn: Rania went to the police officer and gave him the wallet.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ الشُّرْطِيُّ صَاحِبَ الْمَحْفَظَةِ وَأَثْنَى عَلَى رَانِيَةَ.
sentences.translation: Policajac je pronašao vlasnika novčanika i pohvalio Raniju.
sentences.translationEn: The police officer found the wallet's owner and praised Rania.
